chooseUseCase.title: How will you use STOA?
chooseUseCase.subtitle: Choose your primary integration pattern. You can always change this later.
chooseUseCase.mcpAgentDesc: Connect an AI agent (Claude, GPT, custom) to enterprise APIs via MCP protocol.
chooseUseCase.restApiDesc: Integrate with traditional REST APIs using OAuth2 credentials and API keys.
chooseUseCase.bothDesc: Use MCP tools for AI agents AND REST endpoints for traditional integration.

createApp.title: Create your application
createApp.subtitle: This registers an OAuth client that your integration will use to authenticate.
createApp.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this application does...

subscribeApi.title: Subscribe to an API
subscribeApi.subtitle: Pick an API from the catalog to connect your application to.
subscribeApi.noApis: No APIs found. You can skip this step and subscribe later.

firstCall.title: You're all set!
firstCall.subtitle: Your application is ready. Here's how to make your first API call.
firstCall.secretWarning: Save your client secret now — it won't be shown again.
